title: pleurochaenia rigida
intro: Pleurochaenia rigida, also known as the 'Fuzzy Club Moss', is a type of non-vascular plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pleurochaenia rigida include its ability to aid in digestion and reduce stress, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being dried and used in capsules or powders for its medicinal benefits.
